title: HOMETTER Dinosaur Subject Building Toys, STEM Learning Toys, Construction Engineering Kit for Kids, Creative Set Capturing Dinosaurs Game for Boys Age 4 5 6 7 8 9 10+ Years Old
features: Scenarized Building Set with Dinosaurs : 2024 new version of building set. Kids can building one crane and one motorcycle, and then play the game of capturing dinosaurs. Sparks imagination, improves motor skill and offers endless build-and-play fun at the same time.

STEM Education Through Playing 一 Fun and interesting educational toys are designed to improve your children's Science, Technology, Engineering, and Math skills through playing. Keeping children engaging for 1-2 hours each day can enhance his concentration and hand-eye coordination, develop their independent, confident and practical ability.

Easy to Assemble and Organize 一 The building sets come with tools and clear step-by-step guide with photos of the models that can be followed. Your little player can entertains himself by building toys independently.

Dinosaur Subject Building Set 一 2 different designs can be built with 118 pieces of construction blocks. Perfect learning games for classroom kindergarten or home, bringing more fun for 4 5 6 7 8 9 10+ years old boys and girls.
Perect Gift for Kids一 Kids can create an action-filled holiday, Christmas, birthday or any day gift for kids ages 4 5 6 7 8+ who like crane, motorcycle and dinosaurs toys
description: Product Description HOMETTER 2024 New Version of Building Set STEM Educational Building Toys Inspires Kids' Logical Thinking STEM educational toys are designed to improve your children's Science, Technology, Engineering, and Math skills, young builders can use their imagination to start exploring their creative side. Enjoy the leisure of learning and practicing hand-to-eye coordination in the comfort of your home Crane Build a crane to carry the dinosaurs and cage. Motorcycle Build a motorcycle to play game of capturing dinosuars Cage Trap the dinosaurs Perect Gift for Kids Age 4+ Kids can create an action-filled holiday, Christmas, birthday or any day gift. Highly recommend for kids ages 4+ who like building and dinosaurs.
